## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] `npm run build` compiles without errors
- [ ] Manual test with inverter or simulator

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of this project
- [ ] I have added register definitions to the documentation if applicable
- [ ] My changes generate no new build warnings or errors

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here (e.g., register addresses, references to the Modbus protocol PDF).
